name: Southern Corroboree Frog
conservationEfforts: Taronga Zoo and Melbourne Zoo breed captive populations. Field enclosures with treated water protect frogs from chytrid. Fewer than 50 remain in the wild.
description: Australia's most iconic frog with striking black and yellow stripes. Found only in a tiny area of the Australian Alps, it is one of the few poisonous frogs outside the tropics, producing its own alkaloid toxins.
